Rise Payouts: Main Payout Method
Step-by-step guide to setting up Rise for Tradeify payouts and receiving your funds

Updated over 2 weeks ago

Table of contents

⚠️ CRITICAL - DO NOT SKIP

You'll receive a 12-word recovery code during setup.

This is your ONLY way to recover your account if you lose access.

Store it: ✅ Write on paper, keep in safe ✅ Password manager (encrypted) ✅ Multiple secure locations

Never: ❌ Email or cloud storage ❌ Phone notes ❌ Share with anyone (even support)

What You'll Need

- Government-issued photo ID (passport, driver's license, or national ID)

- A clear selfie

- Bank account or crypto wallet details

- SSN/ITIN (US) or Tax ID (international)

Step-by-Step Setup

Step 1: Open Your Rise Invitation Email

Once your payout is approved, check your email for an invitation to join Rise from Tradeify Holdings, Corp.

Action: Click the link in the email to begin signup

Can't find it? Check spam folder or contact Tradeify support to resend.

Step 2: Create Your Rise Account

Visit the signup link in your invitation or go to: https://pay.riseworks.io/sign-up

Enter:

- First and last name (exactly as on your ID)

- Email address (same as your Tradeify account)

Important: Rise uses email-based login for security. You'll receive a login link each time you sign in (expires in 20 minutes).

Step 3: Complete Your Profile

Choose account type: "Receive Payments" (free)

Fill in all required fields:

- Personal information (name, date of birth, phone)

- Address (current residential)

- Tax information:

- US Citizens: SSN or ITIN

- International: Tax ID (your country's ID number)

- Select "Individual" (not Business) unless you're a company

Sign the Master Service Agreement when prompted.

Step 4: Submit Identity Verification (KYC)

KYC verification is required by financial regulations to prevent fraud.

You'll provide:

1. A Live Selfie

- Clear, well-lit photo

- Face visible, no sunglasses/hats

- Look directly at camera

2. Government ID Photo

📸 CRITICAL - Document Photo Requirements:

✅ DO:

- Take photo of physical document (not screenshot)

- Include all four corners

- Ensure good lighting with no glare

- Make sure all text is readable

- Upload both sides if applicable

- Use original, unedited photo

❌ DON'T:

- Use photocopies or scans

- Edit or filter photos

- Take photo of a photo

- Submit expired documents

- Crop corners out of frame

Common rejection reasons:

- Blurry photo → Retake in better light

- Corners missing → Include all four corners

- Edited/filtered → Submit original only

- Expired document → Use current ID

Step 5: Wait for Verification

Automated (most cases): Instant approval, proceed immediately

Manual Review (sometimes required): 1-3 business days

- Rise's team will review your documents

- Check email for any additional requests

- Respond promptly if documents are needed

Step 6: Create Your Rise ID

After approval, create your account security:

Option 1: Password (Recommended)

- 18-42 characters

- Include special character (!@#$%^&*_+)

- Include at least one number

Option 2: Web3 Wallet (advanced users only)

Step 7: Save Your Recovery Code

After approval, you'll receive a 12-word recovery code. See the important warning at the top of this article for storage instructions.

Step 8: Add Withdrawal Method

Choose how you want to receive your funds:

Options:

- Bank Transfer (ACH) - 1-3 business days

- Crypto Tokens - Hours to 1 day

- Local Currencies - Varies by region

How to add:

- Go to "Withdraw" section

- Select "External Accounts"

- Choose your preferred method

- Follow prompts to link account

More options: Rise Withdrawal Methods

Step 9: Join Tradeify's Team in Rise

FINAL REQUIRED STEP - Different from email invitation:

After completing your Rise account setup, you must join Tradeify's team inside the Rise platform.

- Log in to Rise

- Click "Action Items" in left navigation

- Find the team invitation from "Tradeify Holdings, Corp"

- Click "Accept"

Without accepting this team invitation inside Rise, you cannot receive payouts from Tradeify.

Team invitation expired? Contact Tradeify support to resend.

Verification Complete Checklist

Before requesting a payout, confirm:

✅ Rise account created ✅ KYC verification approved (check email) ✅ Rise ID created and password saved ✅ Recovery code saved securely offline ✅ Withdrawal method added ✅ Tradeify team invitation accepted ✅ Account status shows "Active"

How Payouts Work

- Tradeify approves your payout → Within 24-48 hours, funds appear in Rise wallet

- Request withdrawal in Rise → Transfer to your bank/crypto wallet

- Receive funds → 1-3 business days (bank) or hours (crypto)

Already Have a Rise Account?

Auto-Verification Available

If you have an existing verified Rise account and use the same email for Tradeify:

- Verification may happen automatically

- You'll skip most setup steps

- Just accept the Tradeify team invitation

Requirements:

- Same email on both accounts

- Rise account in good standing

- Current KYC verification

Troubleshooting Quick Fixes

No invitation email? → Check spam, verify Tradeify email address or contact Tradeify support

Invitation expired? → Contact Tradeify support for new invitation

Documents rejected? → Review photo quality, ensure all corners visible, use unedited original photo, verify document isn't expired

KYC taking too long? → Check email for document requests, allow 3 business days for manual review

Can't find Tradeify invitation? → Look in "Action Items" tab, request new invitation if expired

Withdrawal method won't link? → Verify account details match verification name, contact Rise support with error message

Security Reminders

🔒 Never share:

- Rise password/security key

- 12-word recovery code

- Login links or verification codes

🔒 Rise/Tradeify will never ask for:

- Your password or recovery code

- Login credentials via email

- Verification codes

Getting Help

Rise Support (verification, documents, technical issues):

- Visit: https://www.riseworks.io/ → Click support button

- Help Center: https://help.riseworks.io/en/

Tradeify Support (payout eligibility, invitations, account questions):

- Use your Tradeify dashboard to contact support.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Is there a fee to use Rise? A: No, "Receive Payments" is free.

Q: How long does setup take? A: 30-60 minutes active time, plus verification wait (instant to 3 days).

Q: Do I need to do this for every payout? A: No, just once. Future payouts are automatic.

Q: Can I use a nickname instead of legal name? A: No, must match your government ID exactly.

Q: What if I lose my recovery code? A: Account recovery becomes extremely difficult or impossible. Store it securely.

Q: Can someone else receive my payouts? A: No, payouts must go to an account in your name.

Q: How long do withdrawals take? A: Bank: 1-3 days, Crypto: Usually within hours.
